caption: A news broadcast features a group of men in formal attire, including Nitish Kumar, who is seen speaking into several microphones. The setting appears to be a press conference with multiple news microphones, including one from "भारत समाचार," positioned in front of the subjects. Throughout the sequence, a red and white news banner persists at the top with the text "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". A smaller banner at the bottom changes from no text to "PM मोदी ने नीतीश कुमार को बधाई दी". To the left, a portrait of Nitish Kumar is accompanied by the label "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and to the right, a list of "मंत्री" (ministers) is displayed, including "बिजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार." In the final sequence, the names on the right change to include "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार." The camera remains focused on the group, with slight shifts in their expressions as they engage with the press.
